title: Healthcare Career Explorer Nurse Practitioner (NP)
description: Healthcare Career Explorer: Nurse Practitioner (NP) introduces learners to the dynamic and evolving role of Nurse Practitioners in today’s healthcare system. Through real-world insights, learners will explore the key responsibilities of NPs across diverse care settings, understand the educational and licensure pathways required to enter the profession, and discover the wide range of career opportunities available in advanced nursing practice.
